questions.question: What sport or activity are the people playing?
questions.answer_key: Badminton or volleyball on a court
questions.rationale: Identifies the main activity and purpose of the gathering

questions.question: What is the playing surface made of?
questions.answer_key: Red or reddish-brown dirt or clay
questions.rationale: Describes the distinctive setting characteristic of the venue

questions.question: What structure divides the two sides of the playing area?
questions.answer_key: A net stretched across the court
questions.rationale: Essential for understanding the sport setup and player positioning

questions.question: What is visible in the background of this outdoor venue?
questions.answer_key: Green fencing, trees, and a covered structure
questions.rationale: Establishes the location as an organized sports facility or school grounds

questions.question: How many players are actively visible on the court at once?
questions.answer_key: Three to four players visible simultaneously
questions.rationale: Helps listener understand the scale and number of participants
